title: funny note on imdb
wikitext:
[]: funny note on imdb             Quote Post by boyfrand » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:05 am http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0860907/fullcredits#cast notice the only characters listed? why is aoba included?! also, imdb spells the title "quickining" lol

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:13 am From the website, "You may report errors and omissions on this page to the IMDb database managers. They will be examined and if approved will be included in a future update. Clicking the 'Update' button will take you through a step-by-step process." Guess this is what you can do with "Quicking" in the title.... I wonder who updated that entry given that very little information had been made available in Japan. BTW, just found that in the IMDB link in its wiki entry it is also "quicking"... http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Evangelion:_3.0#External_links

[]:             Quote Post by boyfrand » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:19 am yeah, actually, i was only bringing attention to the misspelling for a quick laugh but is aoba's mention also laughable? or do you think he'll have a bigger speaking role in 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:25 am boyfrand wrote: yeah, actually, i was only bringing attention to the misspelling for a quick laugh

[]:             Quote Post by Xana » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:37 am Aoba will be the new main protagonist, just as he deserves.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Tue Dec 06, 2011 2:00 pm I'll for Aoba getting a bigger role. He was always one of my favs when watching the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue Dec 06, 2011 2:02 pm Aoba defeats a angel with the power of rock and roll calling it right now

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Dec 06, 2011 3:33 pm ^ with Hyuga as his sidekick But seriously the thing that concerns me is that they have yet to list Mitsuishi or Miyamura. though I'm sure they will, eventually.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 06, 2011 4:04 pm It's IMDB. (That is, not known for an impeccable record when it comes to reporting information about upcoming projects...)

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Wed Dec 07, 2011 2:06 am Final Messenger wrote: Aoba defeats a angel with the power of rock and roll calling it right now

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Dec 07, 2011 8:12 am AngelNo13Bardiel wrote: And together, they shall be known as... TENACIOUS E ! ...what? Somebody had to say it.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Dec 07, 2011 9:14 am Long, long ago they we're hitchhiking down a long and lonesome road. all of the sudden there shines a shiny angel in the middle of nerv-hq and it mindraped

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Wed Dec 07, 2011 2:01 pm Final Messenger wrote: Aoba defeats a angel with the power of rock and roll calling it right now

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Thu Dec 08, 2011 3:06 pm Final Messenger wrote: Aoba defeats a angel with the power of rock and roll calling it right now

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Fri Dec 09, 2011 3:02 am ^ Okay, that would be pretty awesome, too.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Dec 09, 2011 11:26 am imdb is awesome I still remember the days when LAEM was dated for 2005.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Dec 09, 2011 9:09 pm I fondly remember the days when IMDB listed a certain Spencer David as writer & Director of Live Action Evangelion. What made it all the better was the discovery that Spencer David was a spoiled 12 year old kid (from Jersey I think) who put himself as director & writer. 100% certain he would have the film ready in time for his 13th birthday. Kid even wrote a script. http://www.scribd.com/doc/16390459/Spencer-Davids-Neon-Genesis-Evangelion You gotta love IMDB's tendency to fact check. [/url:2cnc1m07]

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat Dec 10, 2011 5:21 am Final Messenger wrote: Aoba defeats a angel with the power of rock and roll calling it right now

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun Dec 11, 2011 8:22 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I fondly remember the days when IMDB listed a certain Spencer David as writer & Director of Live Action Evangelion. What made it all the better was the discovery that Spencer David was a spoiled 12 year old kid (from Jersey I think) who put himself as director & writer. 100% certain he would have the film ready in time for his 13th birthday. Kid even wrote a script. http://www.scribd.com/doc/16390459/Spencer-Davids-Neon-Genesis-Evangelion You gotta love IMDB's tendency to fact check. [/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Sun Dec 11, 2011 8:35 pm Act II: Death and Afterbirth Oh wow.
